content:
# Aerosol Optical Depth

**Summary**: A measure of how much light is blocked by airborne particles (aerosols) in the atmosphere.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2019-alotaibi|Alotaibi, 2019]] used AOD to calculate PM10 concentrations from satellite data.

## Scientific Context

- [[2019-alotaibi|Alotaibi, 2019]] AOD is critical for remote sensing of atmospheric conditions and air quality.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2019-alotaibi|Alotaibi, 2019]] Derived from satellite observations.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Used as a primary metric for determining particulate matter trends across different regions of the Arabian Peninsula. ([[2019-alotaibi|Alotaibi, 2019, p. 13]])
